doctrine: No evidence ledger entry, no gold.

entries.renderedOutputExcerpt:
The economics of the enterprise pricing change — ownership ambiguity between sales and finance are being contested without a priced hypothesis: value capture, willingness-to-pay, and margin floor are all asserted, none tested, while ownership ambiguity between sales and finance compresses the room to manoeuvre. A secondary ownership_ambiguity signal is present and may become primary if the case evolves.
The tension is margin versus momentum: protecting price risks losing deals now; matching pressure surrenders margin permanently — and the case currently lacks the evidence to price that trade. This reading rests on 6 signals in your answers, not on a generic playbook.
Every month without a priced hypothesis converts willingness-to-pay you could have captured into margin permanently surrendered. In this case the stated exposure is Q3 enterprise renewal revenue.
Write a falsifiable pricing

entries.scenarioUsed: post-merger operations team with conflicting priorities
entries.renderedOutputExcerpt:
The principals around Team organisational friction: three of five team leads gave materially conflicting answers about this quarter's top priority hold materially different positions — the divergence shows in execution while the meetings perform agreement, and three of five team leads gave materially conflicting answers about this quarter's top priority keeps the conflict profitable to leave unspoken.
Divergent execution continues, team velocity declines, post-merger integration stalls
Surface the divergence explicitly: collect each lead's written answer to the same three questions, put the conflicts side by side, and resolve them one at a time with the accountable executive. entries.scenarioUsed: post-acquisition board disagreement on integration priorities
entries.renderedOutputExcerpt:
Enterprise governance friction: board members disagree on integration pacing — one insists on speed, two push for caution, one abstains. Pattern classification incomplete from provided evidence (No decision pattern signature reached the minimum evidence threshold in the supplied input.), but the friction itself is clear.
Board disagreement blocks execution, integration timeline slips by quarters, deal value capture erodes, executive team fractures
The CEO (accountable owner) convenes the disagreeing board members or executives for a single decision meeting within 48-hour window. Outcome by end of meeting: write the decision in one sentence. Named owner signs the decision memo. All parties sign commitment to execute by next business day.

blockedProductsWithRouteEvidence.renderedOutputExcerpt:
Tariff repricing moved faster than consensus allocation models.
Late movers absorbed avoidable drawdown and reallocated under worse liquidity.
Run a regime-break stress test against all growth-dependent allocations and set a 72-hour tariff-event decision protocol.
Reclassify the regime before consensus catches up; waiting for confirmation is itself the exposure.
Reusable as a board-level test for structural-break decision latency.

Consensus positioning data
Institutional repositioning lag

Escalation pressure was high while evidence readiness was low.
Premature board escalation would have targeted symptoms and burned escalation credibility.
Complete evidence gathering across all active failure domains before board engagement.
Separate urgency from evidence sufficiency; premature escalation can multiply the failure.

marketRows.whatWeDoBetter: Governed structure plus case-derived judgement, honest limits, escalation triggers, and a reusable decision record.
marketRows.whatTheAlternativeDoesBetter: Real human judgement, case-specific challenge, accountability, and tailored recommendations.
marketRows.whereWeAreWeaker: A strong human consultant still out-judges the instrument on novel, ambiguous cases.
marketRows.whatWouldMakeUsClearlySuperior: Compounding case memory and cross-case pattern intelligence the alternative cannot accumulate.

marketRows.whatWeDoBetter: Governed structure: named sections, honest limits, escalation triggers, and a record format the alternative does not enforce.
marketRows.whatTheAlternativeDoesBetter: Live facilitation, group alignment, real-time challenge from an experienced operator.
marketRows.whereWeAreWeaker: No rendered output has been captured from the actual customer surface, so superiority over this alternative is unproven.
marketRows.whatWouldMakeUsClearlySuperior: Case-derived judgement branches (classification, calibrated severity, pattern comparison across cases) wired into the live customer surface.
